positive: Minimalist geometric mountain range silhouette at sunset, rendered with bold, solid color blocks and strong negative space. The scene features stylized triangular peaks interlocking with smooth, abstract desert floor shapes. Use a limited, highly contrasted color palette of deep indigo blue, burnt orange, and creamy off-white. The composition must be centered and highly scalable for apparel printing, emphasizing clean lines and crisp edges. Vector art style, clean linework, graphic design poster, high contrast, flat design, suitable for screen printing.
